intent: Sweep fixture (compact floor, ratio 1.00) for 1s_1br_sq_side_split_bath_gr -- 8.5x8.5 m lot, 20.25 m2 buildable floor. Deliberately restricted to compact sizes only (2026-07-20): larger sizes (med/max) are now served by the sibling LDK topology 1s_1br_sq_side_split_bath_ld instead (full living/dining/kitchen split), rather than stretching this counter-divider great_room version past its compact scale -- same pattern as the narrow 1BR gr/ld siblings.
